title: Haleoda
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Kattada.jpg|thumb|250px|Haleoda's [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] in [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]].]]
'''Haleoda''' was the main spaceport and [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kattada/Legends|Kattada]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> in [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]]. It was ruled by [[Madam]] [[Mia Ikova]] who was allied with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] leader [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]. It was considered a haven for [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]].

==Appearances==
*[[Empire 5|''Empire'' 5]] {{1st}}
*[[Empire 6|''Empire'' 6]]
